description: Implement five UI improvements: force icon change, coin alignment, legend button in modal, backdrop blur, and Sol clan glow on map figures
steps: 1. In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx: Replace the force display section (lines ~287-291) - change CrossedSwordsIcon to FistIcon with size=18, color '#3498db'. Remove the translation text 'seasonCardsModal.force' and instead just show: [FistIcon] [card.force number]. Update the import to add FistIcon (keep CrossedSwordsIcon import for future use). Also import all legend icons: BushiIcon, ShintoIcon, FortressIcon, DaimyoIcon, MonsterIcon, VPIcon, HonorIcon, RoninIcon, FistIcon, SpringIcon, SummerIcon, AutumnIcon, WinterIcon.

2. In src/components/PlayerCardsModal.tsx: Same force icon change - replace CrossedSwordsIcon with FistIcon (size=18, color '#3498db'), remove the translation text, just show icon + number. Import FistIcon. Keep CrossedSwordsIcon in the import for future use. Also import all legend icons.

3. Fix coin alignment in src/App.css: Find the line with `.season-card-coin{font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--accent-gold)}` and change it to `.season-card-coin{font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--accent-gold);display:inline-flex;align-items:center}`

4. Add legend '?' button in SeasonCardsModal.tsx: Place a .legend-button-wrapper div inside the modal, near the close button area (right side of the modal header or near the theme toggle). It should use the exact same structure as in GameBoard.tsx lines 243-256: a button with class 'legend-btn' showing '?', and a div with class 'legend-tooltip' containing .legend-tooltip-row elements with all 14 icons and their translation keys (legend.bushi, legend.shinto, legend.fortress, legend.daimyo, legend.monster, legend.coin, legend.vp, legend.honor, legend.ronin, legend.force, legend.spring, legend.summer, legend.autumn, legend.winter).
5. Add legend '?' button in PlayerCardsModal.tsx with the same structure as step 4.
6. Add backdrop blur to the season cards modal in src/App.css: Find the `.season-cards-modal-backdrop` rule and add `backdrop-filter:blur(4px)` to it.

7. Add Sol clan golden glow animation in src/App.css: Add `.figure-icon-sol{animation:solGlow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite}` and `@keyframes solGlow{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 2px rgba(255,215,0,0.6))}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(255,215,0,0.9)) drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(255,215,0,0.4))}}`

8. In src/components/RegionCard.tsx: In the FigureIcon component, add the 'figure-icon-sol' class conditionally when ownerClanId === 'sol'. Change each `<span className="figure-icon figure-icon-wrapper">` to include the sol class: `<span className={`figure-icon figure-icon-wrapper${ownerClanId === 'sol' ? ' figure-icon-sol' : ''}`}>`. The ownerClanId variable is already computed at the top of the FigureIcon component.
acceptance_criteria: Force section in SeasonCardsModal shows FistIcon (size 18, blue #3498db) followed by the number only, no text
Force section in PlayerCardsModal shows FistIcon (size 18, blue #3498db) followed by the number only, no text
Coin icon and number are vertically aligned in card cost section
Legend '?' button appears in both SeasonCardsModal and PlayerCardsModal with all 14 icon rows
Sol clan figures on the map have an animated golden glow (solGlow keyframes)
npm run build succeeds with exit code 0
verification: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0
findings: Pre-existing TS errors in BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx and BattlePanel.tsx cause tsc -b to fail (exit code 2) even on main without any changes. The vite build itself succeeds (exit code 0). CrossedSwordsIcon was removed from imports (not kept) because noUnusedLocals:true in tsconfig causes build failure for unused imports. Review fixes applied: (1) Legend tooltip in modal now uses position:fixed to avoid clipping by overflow-y:auto; arrow hidden; max-height with overflow-y:auto for scrollability. (2) solGlow keyframes now include base drop-shadow(0 0 1px #333) to preserve figure outline contrast during animation.
